raw_body:
EMAIL US

Removals in Weybridge and Surrey

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving and storage service. We have worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can place your trust in our team to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Professional and Cost Effective Home and Office Removals 

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving

Deciding which removal company to choose for your move is extremely important. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning will understand your requirements and have both the training and equipment to ensure a straightforward move.

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we can fulfill all of these requirements and offer our customers a complete and professional moving service. Whether you have a 3 piece suite to move across Weybridge, or need assistance with packing, storage or house clearance, we have the necessary equipment, staff and skill to move you with ease. Our team of professionals are also well placed to help and advise on all of your moving needs.

Removals Weybridge - Choose a moving company you can trust 

Mark Ratcliffe founded Mark Ratcliffe Moving and has been working in the UK commercial and domestic removals market for over 30 years. Working with businesses and residents across Weybridge and throughout Surrey, quality is, and has always been, at the core of everything we do. Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre and all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards. Staff are trained and experienced in moving and wrapping household furniture for home and overseas moving, packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, as well as vehicle loading and customer services. With our moving firm you can expect competitive prices, the highest standards and a real commitment from everyone involved.

At the start of your moving journey with us, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home or business at a convenient time to carry out an onsite survey and discuss aspects of your forthcoming move. Packing requirements, insurance cover for your possessions and house clearance can be discussed and a fixed quotation can be provided if required. On the day of your move, a fully trained, fully insured and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect carpets, cover exposed banisters and doors etc. If required, they will pack and move your belongings with care and transport them safely to your new home.

Professional Packing Weybridge

We offer a full packing service or we can arrange packing of fragile items only. Should you decide to carry out your own packing prior to your move day, we provide flat pack moving boxes, bubble wrap, plain paper, tape etc - all at a minimal cost.

Affordable Self Storage   

Mark Ratcliffe Moving also offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers and businesses who prefer to deposit and remove their own goods to and from store. There are a variety of sized rooms available. Our most popular sized room is 77 sqft, which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. This size room is rented at £30 plus vat per week and with our storage rooms being much higher than our competitors and our charges being over 50% less than the rest - they are extremely good value for money. Your valuable possessions will be stored in a secure, clean and damp free environment and you will be the only key holder with great access for loading / unloading.

Whether you are moving within Weybridge or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can meet all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. We would be delighted to give you a quote for removals in Weybridge without any obligation. Please contact our team today to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers.
